Interface OpenApi3xResponse

All Superinterfaces:
Node, OpenApiResponse, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenApi30Response, OpenApi31Response, OpenApi32Response
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi30ResponseImpl, OpenApi31ResponseImpl, OpenApi32ResponseImpl
public interface OpenApi3xResponse extends OpenApiResponse
